A coupon code will be automatically gene: A coupon code will be automatically generated at send time.
Comma-separated list of allowed emails t: Comma-separated list of allowed emails to check against the customer's billing email.
If checked, this coupon will not apply t: If checked, this coupon will not apply to items on sale.
If checked, this coupon cannot be used i: If checked, this coupon cannot be used in conjunction with other coupons.
How many times this coupon can be used b: How many times this coupon can be used by an individual user. Set to 0 for unlimited.
How many times this coupon can be used before it is void. Set to 0 for unlimited.
You do not have permission to view coupo: You do not have permission to view coupons.
